mapper.select:
SELECT jp.id AS jobId, jp.job_title AS jobTitle, jp.job_type AS jobType, jp.job_category AS jobCategory, jp.work_location AS workLocation, jp.salary_range AS salaryRange, jp.education_requirement AS educationRequirement, jp.experience_requirement AS experienceRequirement, jp.recruitment_number AS recruitmentNumber, CASE WHEN jp.application_deadline IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(jp.application_deadline, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 23:59:59') AS DATETIME) END AS applicationDeadline, jp.status AS status, IFNULL(jp.apply_count, 0) AS applyCount, IFNULL(jp.view_count, 0) AS viewCount, jp.enterprise_id AS enterpriseId, e.company_name AS enterpriseName, u.avatar AS enterpriseLogo, CASE WHEN e.verification_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS enterpriseVerified, CASE WHEN latest_app.id IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN latest_app.status IN ('WITHDRAWN', 'CLOSED', 'REJECTED') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS studentApplied, latest_app.id AS studentApplicationId, latest_app.match_score AS matchScore, COALESCE(jp.publish_time, jp.created_time) AS publishTime FROM job_posting jp LEFT JOIN education_user_db.enterprises e ON e.id = jp.enterprise_id LEFT JOIN education_user_db.users u ON u.id = e.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ja.* FROM job_application ja INNER JOIN ( SELECT job_id, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM job_application WHERE student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY job_id ) latest ON latest.max_id = ja.id ) latest_app ON latest_app.job_id = jp.id WHERE 1 = 1
AND jp.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND (jp.application_deadline IS NULL OR jp.application_deadline >= CURRENT_DATE())
AND jp.job_type = #{jobType}
AND ( jp.education_requirement = 'HIGH_SCHOOL' OR jp.education_requirement LIKE '%高中%' )
AND ( jp.education_requirement = 'ASSOCIATE' OR jp.education_requirement = 'COLLEGE' OR jp.education_requirement LIKE '%大专%' )
AND ( jp.education_requirement = 'BACHELOR' OR jp.education_requirement LIKE '%本科%' )
AND ( jp.education_requirement = 'MASTER' OR jp.education_requirement LIKE '%硕士%' )
AND ( jp.education_requirement = 'DOCTOR' OR jp.education_requirement = 'PHD' OR jp.education_requirement LIKE '%博士%' )
AND jp.education_requirement LIKE CONCAT('%', #{educationRequirement}, '%')
AND ( jp.work_location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{city}, '%') OR e.city LIKE CONCAT('%', #{city}, '%') )
AND ( jp.job_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR jp.job_category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR e.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY COALESCE(jp.publish_time, jp.created_time) DESC, jp.id DESC

SELECT jp.id AS jobId, jp.job_title AS jobTitle, jp.job_type AS jobType, jp.job_category AS jobCategory, jp.work_location AS workLocation, jp.salary_range AS salaryRange, jp.education_requirement AS educationRequirement, jp.experience_requirement AS experienceRequirement, jp.recruitment_number AS recruitmentNumber, CASE WHEN jp.application_deadline IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(jp.application_deadline, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 23:59:59') AS DATETIME) END AS applicationDeadline, jp.contact_email AS contactEmail, jp.contact_phone AS contactPhone, jp.job_description AS jobDescription, jp.requirements AS requirements, jp.benefits AS benefits, jp.status AS status, IFNULL(jp.apply_count, 0) AS applyCount, IFNULL(jp.view_count, 0) AS viewCount, e.id AS enterpriseId, e.company_name AS enterpriseName, u.avatar AS enterpriseLogo, e.industry AS industry, e.city AS city, CASE WHEN e.verification_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS enterpriseVerified, e.company_introduction AS enterpriseIntroduction, e.contact_person AS contactName, u.phone AS contactUserPhone, u.email AS contactUserEmail, CASE WHEN latest_app.id IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN latest_app.status IN ('WITHDRAWN', 'CLOSED', 'REJECTED') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS studentApplied, latest_app.id AS studentApplicationId, latest_app.match_score AS matchScore FROM job_posting jp LEFT JOIN education_user_db.enterprises e ON e.id = jp.enterprise_id LEFT JOIN education_user_db.users u ON u.id = e.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ja.* FROM job_application ja INNER JOIN ( SELECT job_id, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM job_application WHERE student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY job_id ) latest ON latest.max_id = ja.id ) latest_app ON latest_app.job_id = jp.id WHERE jp.id = #{jobId} LIMIT 1

SELECT jp.id AS id, jp.enterprise_id AS enterpriseId, jp.job_title AS jobTitle, jp.job_type AS jobType, jp.job_category AS jobCategory, jp.work_location AS workLocation, jp.salary_range AS salaryRange, jp.experience_requirement AS experienceRequirement, jp.education_requirement AS educationRequirement, jp.job_description AS jobDescription, jp.requirements AS requirements, jp.benefits AS benefits, jp.recruitment_number AS recruitmentNumber, jp.application_deadline AS applicationDeadline, jp.contact_email AS contactEmail, jp.contact_phone AS contactPhone, jp.status AS status, jp.publish_time AS publishTime, jp.view_count AS viewCount, IFNULL(stat.totalCount, IFNULL(jp.apply_count, 0)) AS applyCount, IFNULL(stat.pendingCount, 0) AS pendingCount, IFNULL(stat.reviewingCount, 0) AS reviewingCount, IFNULL(stat.interviewCount, 0) AS interviewCount, IFNULL(stat.offerCount, 0) AS offerCount, IFNULL(stat.hiredCount, 0) AS hiredCount, IFNULL(stat.rejectedCount, 0) AS rejectedCount, jp.created_time AS createdTime, jp.updated_time AS updatedTime FROM job_posting jp LEFT JOIN ( SELECT job_id, COUNT(1) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUBMITTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REVIEWING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reviewingCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('INTERVIEW_INVITED', 'INTERVIEW_SCHEDULED', 'INTERVIEW_FINISHED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS interviewCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'OFFER_SENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS offerCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'HIRED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hiredCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'REJECTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejectedCount FROM job_application WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} GROUP BY job_id ) stat ON stat.job_id = jp.id WHERE jp.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND jp.id = #{jobId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE job_posting SET job_title = #{jobTitle}, job_type = #{jobType}, job_category = #{jobCategory}, work_location = #{workLocation}, salary_range = #{salaryRange}, experience_requirement = #{experienceRequirement}, education_requirement = #{educationRequirement}, job_description = #{jobDescription}, requirements = #{requirements}, benefits = #{benefits}, recruitment_number = #{recruitmentNumber}, application_deadline = #{applicationDeadline}, contact_email = #{contactEmail}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, updated_time = #{updatedTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
UPDATE job_posting SET view_count = IFNULL(view_count, 0) + 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE job_posting SET apply_count = IFNULL(apply_count, 0) + #{delta}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT enterprise_id FROM job_posting WHERE enterprise_id IS NOT NULL
